posts.content: Huge turnouts expected for political rallies in Patna Sahib assembly constituency. Development issues are taking center stage! #PatnaSahib #BiharElections2025
How is the candidate ground outreach in Patna Sahib? Hearing that the MGNREGA work distribution and local water issues will decide the swing voters here.
Public Opinion in Patna Sahib: Ground survey of what rural voters want from the next MLA.
